pokemon:togetic.name: Togetic
pokemon:togetic.summary: Togetic is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When the Pokémon spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Togetic is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When the Pokémon spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind- hearted people.
To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind- hearted people.
Although it does not flap its wings very much, it can stay up in the air as it tags along after its trainer.
It is said to appear in front of kindly people to scatter a glowing down called “joy dust.”
It is said to be a POKéMON that brings good fortune. When it spots someone who is pure of heart, a TOGETIC appears and shares its happiness with that person.
It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
They say that it will appear before kindhearted, car­ ing people and shower them with happiness.
They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
No records exist of Togetic being seen in the wilds. Rumors abound that it evolves under the loving care of a trusted human companion, upon whom the Pokémon then bestows great joy.
Togetic is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When the Pokémon spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
It is said to appear in front of kindly people to scatter a glowing down called “joy dust.”
To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind­ hearted people.
TOGETIC is said to be a POKéMON that brings good fortune. When the POKéMON spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
TOGETIC is said to be a POKéMON that brings good fortune. When the POKéMON spots someone who is pure of heart, it is said to appear and share its happiness with that person.
It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
It grows dispirit­ ed if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.
They say that it will appear before kindhearted, caring people and shower them with happiness.
To share its happiness, it flies around the world seeking kind- hearted people.

pokemon:togepi.name: Togepi
pokemon:togepi.summary: As its energy, Togepi uses the positive emotions of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and Pokémon. This Pokémon stores up feelings of happiness inside its shell, then shares them with others.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: As its energy, Togepi uses the positive emotions of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and Pokémon. This Pokémon stores up feelings of happiness inside its shell, then shares them with others.
It transforms the kindness and joy of others into happiness, which it stores in its shell.
It transforms the kindness and joy of others into happiness, which it stores in its shell.
It is considered to be a symbol of good luck. Its shell is said to be filled with happiness.
Its shell is said to be stuffed with happiness that it shares with kindhearted people.
As its energy, it uses the feelings of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and POKéMON. It stores up happy feelings in its shell, then shares them out.
A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping TOGEPI stand up.
The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
This ovate creature is frequently mistaken for a moving egg when encountered out in the fields or in the mountains. Its guileless smile soothes the soul.
As its energy, Togepi uses the positive emotions of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and Pokémon. This Pokémon stores up feelings of happiness inside its shell, then shares them with others.
Its shell is said to be stuffed with happiness that it shares with kindhearted people.
It transforms the kindness and joy of others into happiness, which it stores in its shell.
As its energy, TOGEPI uses the positive emotions of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and POKéMON. This POKéMON stores up feelings of happiness inside its shell, then shares them with others.
As its energy, TOGEPI uses the positive emotions of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and POKéMON. This POKéMON stores up feelings of happiness inside its shell, then shares them with others.
It is considered to be a symbol of good luck. Its shell is said to be filled with happiness.
A proverb claims that happiness will come to any­ one who can make a sleeping TOGEPI stand up.
A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping TOGEPI stand up.
The shell seems to be filled with joy. It is said that it will share good luck when treated kindly.
It transforms the kindness and joy of others into happiness, which it stores in its shell.

pokemon:togekiss.name: Togekiss
pokemon:togekiss.summary: It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.
As everyone knows, it visits peaceful regions, bringing them gifts of kindness and sweet blessings.
Scant few have ever sighted this Pokémon. After studying what literature remains, I am certain Togekiss will reveal itself when peace reigns in the land.
As everyone knows, it visits peaceful regions, bringing them gifts of kindness and sweet blessings.
It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.
It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
Known as a bringer of blessings, it’s been depicted on good-luck charms since ancient times.
As everyone knows, it visits peaceful regions, bringing them gifts of kindness and sweet blessings.
These Pokémon are never seen anywhere near conflict or turmoil. In recent times, they’ve hardly been seen at all.
It shares many blessings with people who respect one another’s rights and avoid needless strife.
